---
title: A few notes about GPUs
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

Before launching into courses involving GPUs, these notes get you started on using GPUs on the Alliance clusters. They also briefly introduce [CUDA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CUDA) and how to access it in Python. Finally, they go over the basic concepts of GPU programming so that you get a sense of what is happening under the hood and are in a better position to customize high-level code where possible.

:::

<br>
[[Start notes ➤](gpu_clusters.qmd)]{.topinline}
